scripts.setup: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const copy = (src, dst) => { if (!fs.existsSync(dst)) { fs.copyFileSync(src, dst); console.log(`✅ Created ${dst}`); } }; copy('server/.env.example', 'server/.env'); copy('client/.env.example', 'client/.env'); console.log('🚀 Setup complete! Please configure your keys in server/.env');"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
